mapper.sql: execution_id, task_id, test_execution_record_id, quartz_job_id, status, scheduled_time, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, duration_seconds, delay_seconds, total_cases, passed_cases, failed_cases, skipped_cases, success_rate, error_message, stack_trace, retry_count, is_retry, original_execution_id, notification_sent, notification_channels, notification_timestamp, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ScheduledTaskExecutions WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ScheduledTaskExecutions SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}

UPDATE ScheduledTaskExecutions SET status = #{status}, actual_start_time = #{actualStartTime}, actual_end_time = #{actualEndTime}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, total_cases = #{totalCases}, passed_cases = #{passedCases}, failed_cases = #{failedCases}, skipped_cases = #{skippedCases}, success_rate = #{successRate}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) FROM ScheduledTaskExecutions WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'success' AND duration_seconds IS NOT NULL
SELECT MAX(duration_seconds) FROM ScheduledTaskExecutions WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'success' AND duration_seconds IS NOT NULL
SELECT MIN(duration_seconds) FROM ScheduledTaskExecutions WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'success' AND duration_seconds IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE ScheduledTaskExecutions SET notification_sent = #{notificationSent}, notification_channels = #{notificationChannels}, notification_timestamp = #{notificationTimestamp}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as execution_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_count, AVG(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN duration_seconds ELSE NULL END) as avg_duration FROM ScheduledTaskExecutions WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
